meta.name: Prep Lifestyle
meta.description: A classic, preppy lifestyle fashion store with a focus on editorial, full-bleed imagery and clean, white-space heavy layouts. The aesthetic is bright, summery, and aspirational, targeting a premium market that appreciates traditional American style.

fonts.sans: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, 'Open Sans', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif
fonts.display: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, 'Open Sans', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif
fonts.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier New', monospace

header.notes: Classic centered logo with left-aligned navigation links and right-aligned icon actions. Minimalist with no visible bottom border in the default state.

footer.notes: Large multi-column footer. Top section features a prominent newsletter signup. Middle section is a 5-column link directory. Bottom section features a large, centered logo with copyright and social media icons aligned to the bottom.

productCard.notes: Very clean product cards. Light grey background (#f4f4f4) for product images. Text is left-aligned below the image. Prices are standard weight. Includes subtle badges like 'Size Inclusive' or 'New' on the bottom left of the image area. A small heart icon for favorites is visible in the top right of the image.

productGrid.notes: Product carousels often show 6 items at a time, very tightly packed with thin gaps. Category grids use 4 equal columns.

featuredProducts.label: New Arrivals
featuredProducts.heading: HOSTED BY
featuredProducts.notes: The primary feature areas are large, full-width imagery rather than typical product grids.

sections.name: hero-campaign
sections.layout: Full-width single column, centered overlay content

design.text: White text over image. Mix of italicized serif for label, large bold sans-serif for main headline, and smaller sans-serif for CTA links.
design.styling: Edge-to-edge layout, tall aspect ratio (almost full screen height)

content.headline: Large campaign title
content.cta: Text links with white underlines instead of traditional buttons

media.description: High-quality, bright lifestyle shot of a person relaxing outdoors, summery mood, wearing striped casual wear.

content.specialElements: Layered text typography (italicized top line, large tracking middle line)

sections.notes: Highly editorial feel. CTAs are simple underlined text links rather than boxes.

sections.name: product-carousel

design.styling: Tight spacing between cards, side navigation arrow overlay on the right

media.description: Studio shots of models wearing the clothing against very light grey backgrounds.

content.specialElements: Circular white next-arrow button floating on the right edge

sections.notes: Clean, catalog-style presentation immediately following an emotional hero.

sections.name: featured-campaign-1
sections.layout: Full-width single column, left-aligned overlay content

media.description: Couple outdoors near a pool/beach umbrella, dark polo and white vest, strong sunlight.

sections.notes: Content is anchored to the middle-left rather than centered.

sections.name: category-grid-1

design.styling: Standard gaps, tall aspect ratio images (approx 3:4)

content.cta: Underlined text links for shop categories below each image

media.description: Lifestyle shots of models in specific clothing categories (knits, polos, shirts, shorts).

sections.notes: Serves as visual navigation to main product categories.

sections.name: featured-campaign-2
sections.layout: Full-width single column, left-aligned overlay content

media.description: Group of friends playing cards outdoors, summery, relaxed vibe, wearing striped shirts.

sections.notes: Similar structure to previous campaign blocks.

sections.name: category-grid-2

design.styling: Standard gaps, tall aspect ratio images

media.description: More lifestyle category shots (linen, sandals, swimwear, dresses).

sections.notes: Follows the exact same pattern as category-grid-1.

sections.name: split-feature

design.background: Left side light blue/grey, right side light grey grid
design.styling: No gaps between the two columns, edge-to-edge

content.headline: Signature collection headline
content.cta: Underlined text links on left side

media.description: Left: Large studio shot of a classic blue polo shirt. Right: A dense 4x4 grid of small editorial and product shots showing various styles and colors.

content.specialElements: The right column is entirely composed of a masonry-like grid of smaller images.

sections.notes: A dense visual section highlighting signature icons. Creates a collage effect on the right.

sections.name: news-stories

design.styling: Standard gaps between columns, text below images

content.headline: Section headlines for each column
content.body: Short descriptive paragraphs about brand news/partnerships

media.description: Brand partnership imagery (sports teams, racing, lifestyle group shots).

sections.notes: Acts as a blog or brand news reel.

content.headline: Store/Brand name + Location
content.body: Paragraph describing the brand offerings and aesthetic for SEO purposes.

sections.name: newsletter

design.styling: Generous vertical padding, top border line

content.headline: Join today and get more
content.cta: Single black button with white text, sharp square corners (0rem radius)

sections.notes: Very minimal newsletter signup block. Just text and a solid black button.
